title: McCarthy Tétrault Partners Kara Smyth and Brett Anderson Appointed as King’s Counsel in Alberta
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Partners Kara Smyth and Brett Anderson Appointed as King’s Counsel in Alberta
Congratulations to our partners Kara Smyth and Brett Anderson on their appointments as King’s Counsel (K.C.) in Alberta. These prestigious appointments are awarded to lawyers who have made a significant contribution to the legal profession or public life in the province, as determined by the Lieutenant Governor in Council.
Nominees are rigorously evaluated by a panel comprised of members of the judiciary, legal community peers, and representatives from the Ministry of Justice and Solicitor General. The assessment considers leadership in the legal field, professional proficiency, ethical conduct, involvement in the administration of justice, community engagement, and commitment to equality.
Kara, a partner in our National Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group , is recognized as a top-tier litigator by Chambers Canada , Lexpert , and other leading directories. She has extensive experience in complex commercial litigation and class actions, and sits on the Firm’s Board of Partners. Kara is deeply committed to mentorship and advancing diversity and inclusion in the profession, while actively contributing to community initiatives such as her pro bono work in the Egale et al v Alberta matter challenging Alberta’s health care ban for gender diverse youth.
Brett, Regional Managing Partner for Alberta and Co-Head of our National Tax Group , is widely regarded for his expertise in tax law, corporate reorganizations, and cross-border transactions. Brett advises clients on sophisticated tax planning strategies and has played a pivotal role in shaping innovative solutions for businesses across industries. His leadership within the Firm and his involvement in professional organizations reflect his dedication to collaboration and excellence.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in all of Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its deep legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
